scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:copy-assets: rm -rf android/app/src/main/assets/public && mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets/public && cp -R dist/. android/app/src/main/assets/public/
scripts.android:build-fast: npm run build && npm run android:copy-assets && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build-clean: npm run build && npm run android:copy-assets && (cd android && ./gradlew --stop || true) && rm -rf android/.gradle android/app/build && cd android && ./gradlew --no-daemon --no-build-cache assembleDebug
